use_case_name: Handle external charging limit with a local controller

structured.name: Handle external charging limit with a local controller
structured.objective: To adjust the charging limits according to the External Control System requirements.
structured.description:
An external control system sends a charging limit to the Local Controller. The Local Controller
notifies the CSMS, calculates the new charging schedules and sends a
SetChargingProfileRequest messages to all Charging Stations for which the charging profile has
changed.
scenario: 1. External control system sends a charging limit/schedule to Local Controller.
2. Local Controller sends a NotifyChargingLimitRequest message to the CSMS.
3. Local Controller calculates new Charging Profiles for all connected Charging Stations.

4. Local Controller sends a SetChargingProfileRequest message to all Charging Stations for
which the charging profile has changed.
5. External control releases a charging limit/schedule to Local Controller.
6. Local Controller sends a ClearedChargingLimitRequest message to the CSMS.
7. Local Controller clears Charging Profiles for all connected Charging Stations.

8. Local Controller sends a ClearChargingProfileRequest messages to all affected Charging
Stations.

requirements.precondition:
When an external charging
limit/schedule is received
requirements.definition: The total load of all Charging Stations SHALL NOT exceed this given limit.

requirements.precondition:
K14.FR.01
AND
Charging limit changed by more
than: LimitChangeSignificance
requirements.definition:
The Local Controller SHALL inform the CSMS of the new charging
limit/schedule imposed by the external system by sending a
NotifyChargingLimitRequest.

requirements.precondition:
When an external charging
limit/schedule is released
requirements.definition:
The local controller SHALL notify the CSMS by sending a
ClearedChargingLimitRequest.

The local controller SHALL clear the hard limit on Charging Stations by
sending a ClearChargingProfileRequest message to the Charging
Stations.

requirements.precondition:
When the Local Controller receives
an external charging limit/schedule
requirements.definition:
It SHALL send a SetChargingProfileRequest to all Charging Stations for
which the charging profile has changed.

The Local Controller SHALL NOT set chargingProfilePurpose to
ChargingStationExternalConstraints.

chunks.content:
# K14 - Handle external charging limit with a local controller

**Objective:** To adjust the charging limits according to the External Control System requirements.

**Description:** An external control system sends a charging limit to the Local Controller. The Local Controller
notifies the CSMS, calculates the new charging schedules and sends a
SetChargingProfileRequest messages to all Charging Stations for which the charging profile has
changed.

**Actors:** External control system, Local Controller, Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. External control system sends a charging limit/schedule to Local Controller.
2. Local Controller sends a NotifyChargingLimitRequest message to the CSMS.
3. Local Controller calculates new Charging Profiles for all connected Charging Stations.
4. Local Controller sends a SetChargingProfileRequest message to all Charging Stations for
which the charging profile has changed.
5. External control releases a charging limit/schedule to Local Controller.
6. Local Controller sends a ClearedChargingLimitRequest message to the CSMS.
7. Local Controller clears Charging Profiles for all connected Charging Stations.
8. Local Controller sends a ClearChargingProfileRequest messages to all affected Charging
Stations.

metadata.heading: K14 - Handle external charging limit with a local controller
metadata.use_case_name: Handle external charging limit with a local controller

chunks.content:
# K14 - Requirements

**K14.FR.01**
Precondition: When an external charging
limit/schedule is received
The total load of all Charging Stations SHALL NOT exceed this given limit.

**K14.FR.02**
Precondition: K14.FR.01
AND
Charging limit changed by more
than: LimitChangeSignificance
The Local Controller SHALL inform the CSMS of the new charging
limit/schedule imposed by the external system by sending a
NotifyChargingLimitRequest.

**K14.FR.03**
Precondition: When an external charging
limit/schedule is released
The local controller SHALL notify the CSMS by sending a
ClearedChargingLimitRequest.

**K14.FR.04**
Precondition: K14.FR.03
The local controller SHALL clear the hard limit on Charging Stations by
sending a ClearChargingProfileRequest message to the Charging
Stations.

**K14.FR.05**
Precondition: When the Local Controller receives
an external charging limit/schedule
It SHALL send a SetChargingProfileRequest to all Charging Stations for
which the charging profile has changed.

**K14.FR.06**
Precondition: K14.FR.05
The Local Controller SHALL NOT set chargingProfilePurpose to
ChargingStationExternalConstraints.

metadata.heading: K14 - Requirements
